features: 6 SOCKET EXTENSION: Expands a single outlet into six, allowing you to connect multiple devices simultaneously.
2M EXTENSION LEAD: Ample cable length for versatile positioning and easy access to power.
NEON INDICATOR: Illuminated switch shows when the extension lead is powered on for added visibility and safety.
WALL-MOUNTABLE: Conveniently designed to be mounted on walls, saving space and keeping cords organized.
CE APPROVED: Meets European safety standards, ensuring reliable and safe usage.
description: Product Description 6 socket extension lead with 2 meter cable UK 3 pin mains plug with neon power indicator in White. Full UK certification Manufacturer Contact Information Status International (UK) Ltd, BD19 5AR.
